inference_mode_definition.screening: Evidence includes chemistry and environmental conditions only. Biological effects are inferred from CPTs.
inference_mode_definition.assessment: Evidence includes chemistry, conditions, and observed biological effects. Effects are hard evidence (P=1.0).
